name: 2pk Game Day Reusable Bag Basketball Orange
description: Score big on style and function with this basketball-inspired tote bag set. Perfect for carrying kids’ snacks, toys, and everyday must-haves, these playful totes feature a sporty design that folds flat for easy storage and travel. The set includes two matching bags, each sized 12" H x 12" W x 5" D, and they’re simple to keep fresh with a quick spot clean or wipe down.
